feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ADT Keyword Highlights Are (STILL) Broken
entry.content:
Hello all,

my previous post from Apr 01 2025 discussed the absolutely broken syntax highlighting in ADT.

Since then, there were zero improvements and highlights still remain broken.

As you can see in the screenshot below, the keyword "LOCK" is not colored correctly, while every other keyword is.

This happens to MANY keywords, as if ABAP was extended, but not the highlighter. Also sometimes, keywords change color when the cursor position changes, but then changes back once you use the scroll wheel to refresh the view without changing the position of the cursor. In my previous post are more examples.

In all honestly, this is unacceptable, as if the developers who develop ADT either don't use it or are not human all together.

entry.title: CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN assign component error
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When I use the function CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN to assign components to a routing, I get the following error:
"Object to be processed could not be uniquely determined."
My BOM components have been modified with an ECN, and the parameters I passed are correct. Has anyone encountered this situation before?
Here is my code,someone can help me ?

  LOOP AT lt_line ASSIGNING <ls_line>.
    CLEAR:lv_datuv,lt_idnrk[].
    lv_datuv = <ls_line>-datuv.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CSAP_MAT_BOM_READ'
      EXPORTING
        material    = <ls_line>-matnr
        plant       = <ls_line>-werks
        bom_usage   = '1'
        alternative = <ls_line>-stlal
        valid_from  = lv_datuv
      TABLES
        t_stpo      = lt_idnrk
      EXCEPTIONS
        error       = 1
        OTHERS      = 2.
    CLEAR:lv_idnrk.
    lv_idnrk = <ls_line>-idnrk.
    lv_idnrk = |{ lv_idnrk ALPHA = OUT }|.
    LOOP AT lt_idnrk ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_idnrk>) WHERE COMPONENT = lv_idnrk AND ITEM_NO = <ls_line>-posnr.

      ls_comp-maintain_mode        = 'C'.
      ls_comp-flag_bar_pointer = '0000000001'.
      ls_comp-sequence_no          = '000000'.
      ls_comp-activity             = <ls_line>-vornr.

      ls_comp-bom_type             = 'M'.
      ls_comp-bom_type_root        = 'M'.
      ls_comp-bom_no               = <ls_idnrk>-BOM_NO.
      ls_comp-bom_no_root          = <ls_idnrk>-BOM_NO.
      ls_comp-alternative_bom      = <ls_line>-stlal.
      ls_comp-alternative_bom_root = <ls_line>-stlal.
      ls_comp-item_id              = <ls_idnrk>-ITEM_NODE.
      ls_comp-item_no              = <ls_idnrk>-ITEM_no.
      ls_comp-plant                = <ls_line>-werks.
      ls_comp-material             = <ls_line>-matnr.
      READ TABLE lt_marc TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY idnrk = <ls_line>-idnrk BINARY SEARCH.
      IF sy-subrc = 0 OR <ls_idnrk>-spproctype = '50'.
         ls_comp-order_lvl = '01'.
         ls_comp-order_path = '01'.
         ls_compx-order_lvl = 'X'.
         ls_compx-order_path = 'X'.
      ENDIF.
      ls_compx-sequence_no          = 'X'.
      ls_compx-activity             = 'X'.
      ls_compx-plant                = 'X'.
      ls_compx-material             = 'X'.
      ls_compx-alternative_bom_root = 'X'.
      ls_compx-bom_type_root        = 'X'.
      ls_compx-bom_no_root          = 'X'.

      APPEND ls_comp TO lt_comp.
      APPEND ls_compx TO lt_compx.
      CLEAR:ls_comp,ls_compx.

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDLOOP.

*  DATA:LV_MODE TYPE C VALUE 'C'.
  CALL FUNCTION 'CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN'
    EXPORTING
      key_date                = lv_key_date
      task_list_type          = 'N'
      task_list_group         = lv_task_list_group
*     TASK_MAINTAIN_MODE      = LV_MODE
      group_counter           = lv_group_counter
      application             = 'PP01'
      bom_usage               = lv_bom_usage
      material                = lv_material  
      plant                   = lv_plant  
    TABLES
      component_allocations   = lt_comp
      component_allocations_x = lt_compx
      return                  = lt_return.

entry.title: PPCI - Error when creating custom OM infotype
entry.content:
Hi,

I have done this so many times but somehow cannot get PPCI to create a custom OM Infotype. I am following the correct steps in creating a new custom OM Infotype but fail to PPCI to create the infotype. I keep on getting an error that "Structure HRI9106 exists" and "R3TR TABL HRI9106 exists" which does not make sense as the structure is required to generate the Infotype. Before i started I made sure that there are no entries in  T778T, T777D, and T777Z and not other structures or programs relating to that Infotype. I have tried using a random high 9 number as well, and it still gives the same error.

https://getsapdone.wordpress.com/2020/06/14/how-to-create-sap-om-infotype/

What am I missing?

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: How to obtain an OAuth 2.0 refresh token using OA2C_CONFIG
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am setting up a Concur integration in SAP using transaction OA2C_CONFIG . I entered the Client ID and Client Secret and Access Settings as follows:

 

Since I was provided with a Company UUID and a Request Token by the Concur administrator, I am using the "Ressource Owner Password Credentials" grant type. But when I request the refresh token in the OA2C_CONFIG with the Company UUID and Request Token, I get a 403 error:

 

The  credentials are correct, since I can get the refresh token via Postman. The SSL certificates have been imported and firewall configurations are fine as well.

My plan is to use the OAuth2 Client with CL_OAUTH2_CLIENT to authorize the http client (cl_http_client ) and call the Concur APIs. 

Is this the correct way handling with with Company UUID and the OAuth2 Client?
Is there a better or recommended approach for this scenario?

Enviroment: SAP S/4HANA 2025

entry.title: How to update Virtual Element field in list report from action button c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a custom Fiori application , in Projection view there is a virtual element added which is a qty field . The requirment is to update the virtual field for the selected records in the fiori application on a button click through RAP action.The qty field should be calculated for user on click and show the value temporarily in the new virtual column in the list report. Kindly guide on how this can be achieved ,in ABAP class of the virtual field the global variables set inside the behaviour class is not available or getting cleared.

Regards

Niranjan

entry.title: How make fields in VA02 editable after an error or warning message is displayed?
entry.content:
Goal: I am trying to implement an error message when a line item is created in VA02 without values from VGPOS/VGBEL, then the user accidentally saves the document-- an error or warning message has to be displayed then that specific line item has to be modifiable.

Replication steps:
1. In VA02, create a new line item with a POSNR value of 120,000

2. The user then tried to save the document immediately. THe warning message is displayed, but instead of line 120,000 being modifiable--it is currently in read-only mode UNLESS the user will double click it. Additionally, the top most line item was highlighted by SAP instead of the line 120,000.

So my concern, is it possible to redirect the standard's logic of SAP from highlighting the top most line item into my current line item with error. And that line item has to be readily modifiable without pressing enter or double click.

entry.title: SQL: Left position Vs. Right position in JOINS
entry.content:
Hello,
In the below SQL in the 6th line the 'b' (CSKT) has been specified in the left postion but whereas in all the rest (5,7 and 8 of the lines the 'b' has been specified in right position, so in this case pls. let us know wheter this SQL is ok? is it pulls correct data? is it pulls ALL the qualfied records? Thanks

SELECT a~kokrs a~bukrs a~kostl b~ltext
  INTO TABLE (lt_cost_data)
  FROM csks AS a
  LEFT JOIN cskt AS b
  ON  a~kokrs EQ b~kokrs
  AND b~spras EQ sy-langu "Here I took 'B'(CSKT) in left position, is it ok?  
  AND a~kostl EQ b~kostl        
  AND a~datbi EQ b~datbi         
  WHERE a~kokrs EQ   p_kokrs    
  AND a~kostl   IN   s_kostl 
  AND a~bukrs   IN   s_bukrs  
  AND a~datbi   GE  sy-datum   
  AND a~datab   LE  sy-datum.

entry.title: Adding the custom field in the TCODE : VA01 SCREEN NO : 4900 PROGRAM : SAPMV45A
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement I want to add one custom field in the TCODE : VA01 under the Sales tab that means SCREEN NUMBER : 4900 when I am trying to edit the screen it was asking for the access key because as it was standard code so without using the access key how can I insert the column in the table control of screen 4900 till now. I have appended the field in the VBAP table and created the structure as well

Can anyone please guide me. 

Thanks,

Ganesh T.

entry.title: Issue regarding the running the report using the CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Everyone.

I facing one issue in the CDS views. First of all I have developed the sales register using the CDS views in SAP ECC and using the class : CL_SALV_TABLE in the SAP GUI. I am displaying the report but issue here is when i am trying to run the report for some records it is running fine. Suppose if I specify the range of date like Example. one month data it was still running and displaying the dump. Please look into the screenshot attached.

@developer @ABAP 

Thanks,

Ganesh.

entry.title: How to add purchase group in J1IGSUBREP Report
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How can I add additional fields (e.g., EKGRP) in the J1IGSUBREP report? Kindly refer me to any BAdI or user exit available for this requirement.

Advance thanks.

entry.title: IDE in VSCODE
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Would like to know the current status/update regarding SAP IDE support in VS Code.

Last year SAP shared updates about bringing ABAP Development Tools / IDE capabilities into VS Code. Could you please share:

Current availability status
Planned roadmap / GA timeline

entry.title: USER EXIT OR BADI FOR AUTOMATIC SERIAL NUMBER CREATION IN CO01
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to create serial numbers automatically during Production Order creation in SAP CO01. Kindly suggest any suitable BAdI or user exit to achieve this requirement.

Advance Thanks

entry.title: Hi team, I want transfer the Additional fields from the Product master from S4 HANA to GTS.
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

In the standard SAP GTS build, S/4 materials are replicated in the SAP GTS system via RFC and information from the basic data view is migrated automatically in the system. For material level attributes not transferred natively, a GTS Badi is available in the S/4 GTS Plug-In.  Combined with SAP GTS IMG configuration the system can store these additional values in predefined table fields specified in configuration. Additional fields, in the material master, need to be passed to GTS, from S/4 System

  • Customs description (Sales text)
  • Material Type
  • Material Group
  • Division
  • Country of Origin

Can someone please tell me How I can proceed with the Development ?
very High in complexity. kindly please response as soon as possible. 7499552629.

entry.title: Date format is not correct when we download the document from SAP.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We need your help on below issue  
We have created a Batch job to Download the SAP report automatically into user system every day. The batch job is working fine and it is downloading the report in the EXCEL format. But when the user opening the automatic downloaded excel document, the date format got disturbed.

It is not coming in a date format, it is appearing as just number.

So, we need your help to resolve this issue.

User is facing this issue only when the report downloaded automatically through batch job.

If the user manually downloads the document, it is working fine without any issue.

Kindly check the attachment related to issue user facing.

Thanks & Regards,
Gagana N

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").
Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.
  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.
  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.
  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.
  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.
  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.
  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.
  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:
    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.
    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

Has anyone experienced something similar with BC-FES-ITS or CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2 dumps?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").

Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.

  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.

  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.

  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.

  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.

  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.

  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:

    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.

    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

It seems related specifically to WebGUI / ITS runtime because the dump occurs in:

CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Component: BC-FES-ITS

Has anyone experienced something similar before?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Submit and return silent skip in process inbound api
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have an issue sometimes data from the inbound REST API silently skips the process. When this happens, no data is processed, and absolutely no log is written into our custom logging table. Since this issue only happens occasionally in Production (and works fine in Development/Quality environments), I suspect it might be related to system load or session limitations. The submit program originally waiting time with default 12 second the code look like this.

  SUBMIT zxxx WITH v_wait = 12
              AND RETURN.

Any insights, experiences, or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: LT10 single transfer order for multiple handling units in fiori app
entry.content:
My goal is to replicate the LT10 behavior by creating a custom Fiori application where a user can select multiple Handling Units from a list and trigger the creation of a single Transfer Order (TO) containing multiple items (one per HU), instead of multiple single-item TOs.

I started investigating RAP and creating custom CDS Views. Anyways I'm a begginer in SAP so my knowledge is insufficient.
My question is : is it even possible ?

if yes, how ?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: How we can pass parameters from UI5 application to HTML for gui app in fiori lauchpad?
entry.content:
Here is my custom application where sales order is generated with billing document number and parcel number. Those Billing document and parcel number i have to display in HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher) custom ABAP report in Fiori Launchpad. 

  Above billing document number and parcel number i have to pass to HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher)

Here is the js function i have written 

onReceiptBoucher: function() {
var sBillingDoc = 78454656565;
var sParcelNo = 5454626526;
 
if (!sBillingDoc || !sParcelNo) {
sap.m.MessageBox.error("Please generate billing document first.");
return;
}
 
var xmservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container &&
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
 
if (xmservice) {
var hash = xmservice.hrefForExternal({
target: {
semanticObject: "ZRV",
action: "display"
},
// Parameters perfectly match your configuration mapping
params: {
"BillingDoc": [String(sBillingDoc)],
"ParcelNum": [String(sParcelNo)],
"DYNP_OKCODE": ["=ONLI"] // Bypasses selection screen by clicking Execute
}
});
 
var url = window.location.href.split('#')[0] + hash;
sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(url, true);
} else {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Fiori Launchpad services are unavailable.");
}
}

entry.title: Recommended way to retrieve an OTR long text by alias in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,
with transactions SOTR_EDIT and SE63 it is possible to provide texts and translations. These texts can be loaded in ABAP code using function modules. When creating a new entry in SOTR_EDIT you have to choose between short and long text. When retrieving the texts in ABAP everything is working fine with short texts - but not with long texts.
 
Method CL_WD_UTILITIES=>GET_OTR_TEXT_BY_ALIAS works for both short and long texts. But the description of the method contains a warning ("DO NOT USE").
 
Function module SOTR_GET_TEXT_KEY can only retrieve short texts.
 
Function module SOTR_STRING_READ_TEXT_WITH_KEY could read long text, but you have to provide the concept id.
The function module SOTR_GET_KEY_FOR_ALIAS can retrieve concept ids for short text, but not for long text.
 
So I'm stuck here and I'd  like to know what is the recommended way to retrieve an OTR long text for an alias in ABAP? Which methods or function modules do you use?
 
Kind regards
Guido
